partial_progress.details: Post-completion analysis confirms task 46 is fully resolved by tasks 50 and 51. All original goals achieved: forward_chain_p_step proven, succ_chain_fam_p_step sorry filled, lake build passes, no new axioms.

findings.reason: Tasks 50 and 51 fully implemented the constrained successor seed approach (Option 2 from task 46 analysis), proving forward_chain_p_step structurally and filling the sorry in succ_chain_fam_p_step.
findings.completion_summary: All goals achieved via spawned tasks 50-51: forward_chain_p_step proven at SuccChainFMCS.lean:209, succ_chain_fam_p_step sorry filled, lake build passes (927 jobs), no new axioms introduced.
findings.remaining_sorries_explanation: 2 deprecated theorems (f_nesting_is_bounded, p_nesting_is_bounded) are mathematically false for arbitrary MCS and kept for backward compatibility
